title: Sticker by Number - Color Book
description: Sticker by Number is a fun and relaxing coloring game that combines color by number with puzzle-solving. Find and match stickers to the correct spots to reveal stunning breathtaking landscapes, cute animals, and vibrant patterns. Enjoy a stress relief experience that’s both creative and fun for all ages!
how_to_play: Find and match stickers to the correct spots in the gameplay arena.
Complete levels to reveal breathtaking landscapes and patterns.
Progress through themed sticker packs and story elements.
key_features: Relaxing mix of color therapy and puzzle-solving.
Countless unique stickers and animated creations.
Themes for all ages, from kids to adults.
Perfect for stress relief and brain testing.

title: Zen Math Crossword
description: Challenge your mind with Zen Math Crossword, a unique puzzle game that blends arithmetic with classic crosswords! Solve equations, tackle fractions, and master various mathematical operations to fill the grid. Perfect for students and adults, this game makes learning math fun and engaging.
how_to_play: Solve mathematical problems using addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
Use logic and critical thinking to figure out the best way to solve each puzzle.
Fill the crossword grid by solving equations.
key_features: Diverse Math Puzzles: Equations, fractions, and more.
Skill Enhancement: Sharpen your arithmetic and logical thinking.
Progressive Difficulty: Challenges for every skill level.
Helpful Hints: Get unstuck and keep your progress going.

title: Cozy Finds: Hidden Objects
description: Cozy finds is a relaxing hidden objects game made for quiet moments and calm play. Explore warm, beautifully illustrated scenes and enjoy seek and find puzzles at your own pace. Each level is a different adventure perfectly designed to keep you engrossed and engaged. Find a cozy corner and play cozy finds and discover hidden objects. No timers. No pressure. Just cozy discovery.
how_to_play: Search the Scene: Explore beautifully illustrated environments filled with carefully hidden objects.
Find Hidden Objects: Look closely and tap on each hidden object from your list to complete the level.
Zoom for Detail: Pinch and Zoom to focus and find tricky hidden objects.
Use Hints When Needed: Stuck on a tricky object? Use helpful hints to guide you.
key_features: Cozy hidden object scenes to explore
Play at your own pace no stress, no rush
Soft visuals and soothing atmosphere
Perfect for winding down or casual play

title: Bird Rescue Jam: Sort Puzzle
description: In this rescue block puzzle game, you need to complete brain teasing parking challenges, shoot bubbles down, solve the bird puzzle, and defeat the evil crocodile. This exciting rescue adventure is perfect for players of all ages who enjoy quick reflex games, puzzle challenges, and survival adventures.
how_to_play: Tap and slide the ammo box that matches the bubbles color to fire the cannon and free the birds.
Each cannon shot destroys a bubble and delays the birds from getting caught by the hungry crocodile.
Help all the birds reach the treehouse and clear the level.
key_features: Fun and easy to play controls.
Exciting rescue missions with increasing difficulty.
Colorful graphics and engaging sound effects.
Endless challenges for all ages.

title: Grill Master: Food Sort Puzzle
description: Fire up the grill and get your brain sizzling! Grill Master: Food Sort Puzzle combines the satisfaction of a BBQ with the challenge of a classic sorting logic game. Sort the food items until every skewer or plate holds only one type of delicious treat.
how_to_play: Tap to move food items from one grill station to another.
Match ingredients together—group the steaks, peppers, corn, and shrimps!
Plan your moves carefully so you don't run out of space on the grill.
Clear the level to serve the perfect feast!
key_features: Delicious Graphics: Feast your eyes on high-quality, mouth-watering 3D food assets.
Brain-Teasing Logic: Hundreds of challenging levels that get harder as you play.
Satisfying ASMR: Enjoy the relaxing sounds of sizzling meat and crackling charcoal.
No Stress: No timers or penalties. Play at your own pace.
